name: Benne Brittle
recipeInstructions:
Benne seeds cannot be procured in many places, but the candy made with it is so delicious and characteristic of Charleston that the recipe is included.
Add the extracts to the sugar. Melt the sugar in a saucepan, stirring constantly until dissolved.
When the sugar is melted, add the benne seed and stir quickly to coat the seeds evenly.
Pour the mixture onto a marble slab or into lightly buttered pans.
While still warm, mark the candy into one-inch squares.
Allow the candy to cool completely before breaking along the marked lines.
